rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the map_one'/map_mul' rfl-through-defeq issue, but Review 1 also catches the same problem in instFiberMulAction's one_smul/mul_smul (confirmed at ~line 93) and the brittle rfl-through-by-simpa in smul_fiber_mk (confirmed at ~line 105). Acting on Review 1 eliminates those two additional instances of the same maintainability problem; acting on Review 2 leaves them unfixed.
